goal: Implement ucil-lsp-diagnostics server_sharing module: degraded-mode spawner that stands up pyright, rust-analyzer, and typescript-language-server subprocesses with a 5-minute idle grace period when Serena is unavailable.
plan_summary: Add a new `server_sharing` submodule to `ucil-lsp-diagnostics` that owns the degraded-mode LSP subprocess lifecycle. On construction, it reads a per-language command map (pyright-langserver, rust-analyzer, typescript-language-server by default), tests binary availability via `tokio::process::Command`, and for each present server: spawns a child process, records the handle + last-used Instant, and inserts a matching `LspTransport::Standalone` entry into the bridge's endpoint map. Idle sessions reset the grace clock; once the grace period elapses (configurable via ADR-linked config — defaulting to the 5 min from master-plan §config `grace_period_minutes = 5`), a background reaper task gracefully shuts the child via SIGTERM + drop(stdin), then awaits child exit under a `tokio::time::timeout`. Tests mint their own spawner with a sleep-based stand-in command so CI hosts without pyright/rust-analyzer installed still exercise the lifecycle.
scope_in: - `FallbackSpawner` struct holding a `HashMap<Language, ServerHandle>` of live children
- `ServerHandle` struct with PID, `tokio::process::Child`, last-used `Instant`, and configured `LspTransport::Standalone` copy
- `FallbackSpawner::new(commands: &HashMap<Language, (String, Vec<String>)>) -> Result<Self, ServerSharingError>` that spawns one subprocess per configured-AND-available binary
- `FallbackSpawner::install_into(&self, bridge: &mut LspDiagnosticsBridge)` that populates the bridge's endpoint map with `LspTransport::Standalone { command, args }` entries for every live server
- `FallbackSpawner::touch(&mut self, language: Language)` to refresh the idle clock on LSP activity

- A grace-period reaper task (module-local `async fn reap_idle`) started from `new` via `tokio::spawn` that polls every `REAP_INTERVAL` and shuts any server whose `last_used + grace_period` has elapsed
- `ServerSharingError` enum via thiserror — variants at minimum: `BinaryNotFound { language, command }`, `SpawnFailed { language, source: std::io::Error }`, `ShutdownTimeout { language }`
- `impl Drop for FallbackSpawner` — best-effort graceful shutdown of surviving children
Extend `bridge.rs` with a `with_fallback_spawner` constructor (additive per DEC-0008 §Consequences) so callers can construct a degraded-mode bridge and keep the spawner alive alongside it
Wire the new module through `lib.rs`: `pub mod server_sharing;` and re-exports for `FallbackSpawner`, `ServerSharingError`

- module-root `#[cfg(test)] #[tokio::test] async fn test_fallback_spawn()` that uses a sleep-based stand-in command (`sleep 60` on Unix) for two languages, asserts endpoints are registered into the bridge, asserts the children are alive, triggers `touch` to prove the idle timer resets, then explicitly shuts down via a short test-only `shutdown_all()` helper and asserts children exit within `SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT`

- a secondary `tests` submodule covering binary-not-found handling (pass a bogus command → `SpawnFailed` or `BinaryNotFound` surfaces) without polluting the frozen selector `server_sharing::test_fallback_spawn`

Add any missing `[dependencies]` / `[dev-dependencies]` — expect `which` for binary detection and `tokio` features (process, time, sync) — these should already be in `tokio.workspace = true` feature set; add sparingly
scope_out: No real LSP JSON-RPC traffic — that lives in `P1-W5-F04` / P1-W5-F08 integration tests
No daemon integration (computing `serena_managed` from `PluginManager::registered_runtimes()`) — reserved for a future WO per DEC-0008
No config-file parsing — `[lsp_diagnostics] grace_period_minutes` and `max_concurrent_servers` are accepted as constructor arguments or module constants; TOML parsing is deferred
No CEQP or MCP tool wiring
No changes under `crates/ucil-daemon`, `crates/ucil-core`, or any other crate beyond `ucil-lsp-diagnostics`
No mocking of `tokio::process::Child` — use a real stand-in binary (`sleep`) to drive the lifecycle machinery
acceptance: Frozen test selector `server_sharing::test_fallback_spawn` names a module-root `#[tokio::test]` function that passes
`FallbackSpawner::install_into` populates `LspDiagnosticsBridge` endpoints with `LspTransport::Standalone` entries for every spawned language
A missing binary is handled gracefully: spawn result is either `BinaryNotFound` or `SpawnFailed`, never a panic
Grace-period reaper uses `tokio::time::timeout` on every IO `.await` per rust-style.md
No `std::process::Command` anywhere in the new module — all spawns use `tokio::process::Command`
Crate still compiles with `#![deny(warnings)]` and clippy pedantic/nursery clean
No `#[ignore]`, `.skip()`, or `todo!()` in the new code
context_refs: master-plan:§13.4 lines 1424-1431 (Serena detection + degraded mode lifecycle)
master-plan:§18 Phase 1 Week 5 item 7 (When Serena unavailable: bridge spawns own LSP servers)
rules:.claude/rules/rust-style.md (tokio::time::timeout on IO awaits; thiserror for errors; no std::process::Command in async)
lessons_applied: WO-0006/WO-0007/WO-0011/WO-0013 — module-root discipline for frozen-pattern-aligned tests: the `test_fallback_spawn` test is at module root, not inside `mod tests { ... }`
WO-0024 — keep scope tight on crate-internal features; one feature per WO while WO-0024 itself is mid-recovery on P1-W4-F02/F08
WO-0027 — avoid cross-module PATH/state contention; the spawner holds its child handles in its own struct, not a crate-level static
Phase-1 invariant §9 does NOT apply (not an MCP tool stub); invariant §7 DOES apply (tokio::time::timeout on every IO await)
DEC-0008 §Consequences — `with_fallback_spawner` is additive; `new(bool)` signature stays byte-for-byte unchanged
